creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #3)
It's not actively maintained, but why would it die? Plenty of people are still running jails using this tool.

Unfortunately, VNET though supported, has never been implemented, and proper implementation with man page updates will rather not fit in the patch. 

Are there plans to deprecate or retire ezjail and remove it from the ports tree?
